Defendant Virginia Taaga'S Claim On Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Virginia Taaga, Tel. 415.646.5191, claimant/judgment debtor appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. Defendant Virginia Taaga's Claim of Exemption is granted. $150.00 shall be garnished from the judgment debtor. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption

Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT,INC.'S Hearing on Claim of Exemption will be heard on the LAW and MOTION calendar at 9:30 a.m. Judge Pro Tem: James P. Watson; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported.
(302/JPT)
